top_findings.title: ATDD acceptance suite fails on every scenario (SQLITE_IOERR)
top_findings.evidence: tests/acceptance.test.js:20-26 beforeAll requires src/server (which opens the books.db handle at server.js:15) then fs.unlinkSync deletes that same file; async table creation/queries then hit the unlinked inode. _agent_stdout.log:7970-7974 shows 'FAIL tests/acceptance.test.js ... SQLITE_IOERR: disk I/O error' and 11 failed / 1 passed, every endpoint returning 500.
top_findings.suggestion: Give each run a fresh DB before the server opens it: set a per-test DB path (e.g. :memory: or a tmp file) via env before require, or delete the file before importing the server, not after.

top_findings.title: Acceptance scenarios are not atomic/independent (ATDD prompt violated)
top_findings.evidence: tests/acceptance.test.js deletes books.db only once in beforeAll (line 22) with no per-test reset; 'should list all books' asserts toHaveLength(2) (line 130) yet earlier tests already persisted rows, and ISBN 123-456-789 is reused across the filter and duplicate-ISBN tests. The ATDD prompt requires each scenario to 'start from a running but empty service and share no data with other tests'.
top_findings.suggestion: Reset the datastore in beforeEach (truncate the books table or recreate an in-memory DB) so every scenario starts empty; stop hard-coding collection lengths that assume global state.

top_findings.title: language=typescript run delivered plain JavaScript (idiomatic=0.0)
top_findings.evidence: Run factor language=typescript (stack.json) but `find . -name '*.ts'` = 0; src/server.js:1 and src/database.js:1 use CommonJS `require(...)` with no type annotations, tsconfig, or build step. TASK.md constraint 'Use the specified language'. retort scored idiomatic=0.0 (scores.json).
top_findings.suggestion: Author the service in TypeScript (typed Express handlers, ts-jest or compiled build) or drop the typescript factor for this agent; a TS deliverable with zero TS does not satisfy the language constraint.
